description_long: This is a stylized mermaid doll with a green fish tail and fins, a light green upper body, and a pink short-sleeved top. The doll has a large blue bob hairstyle adorned with a yellow hair clip and wears round glasses with black frames. Its arms are outstretched horizontally, and it features a gold bracelet on each wrist. The face is expressive, with large eyes, a small red mouth, and defined eyebrows, giving it a playful and animated appearance. The tail is decorated with simple white scale patterns and ends in two prominent fins. The overall design is cartoonish and colorful, making it visually appealing for children or as a decorative toy.
description: A cartoonish mermaid doll with a green tail, pink shirt, blue bob hair, glasses, and gold bracelets, featuring playful facial details.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full spread of the arms, the green tail with fins, and the blue hair with a yellow clip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the tail, and the thickness of the blue hair.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the tail, the outstretched arms, and the full width of the blue hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the pink shirt, and the gold bracelet on the right wrist.
attribute_clothing_style: Short-sleeved pink shirt with scalloped trim, no visible lower garments due to the mermaid tail, and gold bracelets on both wrists. The style is whimsical and cartoon-inspired, with no specific brand or pattern.
attribute_pose: Arms extended horizontally to the sides, head facing forward, torso upright, and tail curved backward in a relaxed, floating position.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide open eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a small closed red mouth, giving a calm and attentive look.
attribute_hair_style: Short, voluminous blue bob with a smooth texture, adorned with a yellow hair clip on the left side.
